input.review_text: An absolutely breathtaking film with stellar performances and a gripping story.
A complete waste of time. The plot was incoherent and the acting was wooden.
I laughed, I cried, I was deeply moved. A masterpiece of modern cinema.
Dull, slow, and predictable. I kept checking my watch.
One of the best movies I have seen this year. Highly recommended to everyone.
Terrible dialogue and a nonsensical ending ruined what could have been decent.
A delightful, heartwarming experience with unforgettable characters.
Boring, derivative, and poorly edited. Save your money.
Visually stunning and emotionally resonant from start to finish.
Painfully bad. The worst two hours I have spent in a theater.
